        self,
        client: httpx.Client,
        local_source_server,
    ) -> None:

        dataset_id = _ingest_source(

            local_source_server,
            path="/header_time_whitespace.csv",
            body=(b" name ,time\nAlice, 08:30 \nBob,09:15\n"),
